Title Decision - Sprint Qualifying SC2-SC1 Times

Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen

2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 – 05 July 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 24 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  03 July 2026 
 
        Time  18:10 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Sprint Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 cars below exceeded the 1:39.0 time limit between the Safety Car lines. 
 
No. Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time

4 6 Isack Hadjar Oracle Red Bull Racing 16:40:25 L5 (SQ1)
